# **Hospital Management Software for Aurora Hospital** **Module: Patient Appointment**

# **Pre-Requisite features:**

1\. Doctor Department Creation  
2\. Doctor Creation  
3\. Doctor Scheduling Management  
4\. Doctor Leave Management  
5\. Doctor Attendance Management  
6\. Doctor's Instruction  
7\. Doctor schedule-related reports

## **1\. Doctor Department Creation**

Purpose  
To organize doctors based on medical specialties and departments.  
**Features:** Create, update, delete, and status(active, inactive) departments  
Data Fields: 

* Department ID  
* Department Name \* (Required)  
* General visit amount   
* Status (Active / Inactive)

![][image1]

**List View**

* The existing Department list: Show as a table  
* With flitter  
* Edit, Delete, Active/Deactivate  
* Export list: Filter-wise Pagination

## **2\. Doctor Creation (Doctor Registration Form)**

This section documents the **Doctor Registration / Doctor Info** form. And the existing doctor list with edit, delete, active/inactive, with a filter.  
Purpose  
To capture the complete personal, professional, scheduling, and appointment-related configuration of a doctor.  
**1 Basic Identification**

* **Ref./Doctor Code**: Unique system-generated reference number \[Example: First Letter of Department, First Letter of Doctor, Numeric serial. Department: Nephrology, Doctor Name: Abul Kalam \- ID: NA0001 \- Auto generate\]  
* **Doctor Name**: Full name of the doctor  
* **Department**: Select from the department table   
* **Status**: Indoor Doctor / Outdoor Doctor  
* **Doctor Type**: Visiting / Permanent / Consultant

**2 Professional Details**

* **Degree**: Academic qualifications (MBBS, FCPS, MD, etc.)  
* **Speciality**: Area of medical specialization  
* **Institute**: Educational institute name  
* **M.E. ID**: Medical Council / Medical Enrollment ID  
* **Chamber**: Assigned chamber/unit (e.g., Unit-01)  
* **Room No**: Doctor's room number

**3 Personal Information**

* **Gender**: Male / Female / Other  
* **Birth Date**: Doctor's date of birth  
* **Spouse Name**: Spouse's full name  
* **Spouse Birth Date**: Spouse's date of birth  
* **Marriage Date**: Marriage date

**4 Contact & Address Information**

* **Phone No**: Primary contact number  
* **Email**: Email address  
* **District**: District name  
* **Thana**: Police station / sub-district  
* **Area**: Area/locality  
* **Present Address**: Full current address

**5 Registration & Availability**

* **Registration Date**: Doctor registration date in the system  
* **Doctor Availability**: Available / Not Available  
* **Will Prescription**: Yes / No (whether doctor provides prescription)

**6 Appointment & Serial Configuration**

* **Serial Start From**: Starting serial number for appointments  
* **Patient Per Day**: Maximum patients per day  
* **No of Days Can Appointment**: Advance booking limit (days)  
* **Sl No in Apps List**: Serial display order

**7 Appointment Source Limits**

* **No of Appointments Taken From Web**: Web appointment limit  
* **No of Appointments from Mobile**: Mobile app appointment limit

**8 Visit & Fee Configuration**

* **Doctor Visit (New)**: Fee for new patient  
* **Doctor Visit Old**: Fee for returning patient  
* **Take Commission**: Yes / No  
* **Reference Type**: Referral source

**9 Communication Settings**

* **Send SMS**: Yes / No (appointment notification)

**10 System Actions**

* **Save**: Save doctor information  
* **List**: View doctor list  
* **Print List**: Print the doctor's information list

![][image2]

**List View of doctor info:** View list in the same page as the attached file

* The existing Doctor list is shown as a table  
* With filter  
* Edit, Delete, Active/Deactivate  
* Export the list: Filter-wise pagination

## **3\. Doctor Scheduling Management:** **Form Fields:** Dr Code, Dr Name, Dr. Department (New Addition), Dr. Degree, Dr. Speciality, Schedule Table **Input Fields:**

1. Dr Code (Unique Code for each doctor) \[Auto Suggest Dropdown field\]

![][image3]

**Schedule Table:**  
**Headers:** Days, Shift, Start Time, End Time, Duration (each patient), Action (Add / Edit / Delete)  
**While adding schedule data, all the fields will be auto-suggest dropdown.**

**![][image4]**  
**![][image5]**  
**![][image6]**  
**![][image7]**

**Doctors List View:**

1. View all doctors with search criteria on the same page of Doctor Scheduling.  
   ![][image8]  
2. Clicking on the Edit Icon in the list will show the doctor’s data in edit mode.  
   ![][image9]

3. 10 data per page (Editable)

# **4\. Doctor Leave Management:**

**Purpose**  
To manage the planned and emergency leave of doctors.  
**Features**

* Leave application (planned/emergency)  
* Approval workflow (Admin/Manager)  
* Automatic appointment cancellation or rescheduling

**Data Fields**

* Doctor Code (Unique system-generated reference number)  
* Doctor Name  
* Doctor Department  
* Leave Type  
* Leave Start Date  
* Leave End Date  
* Create date  
* Reason/Cause  
  ![][image10]

**List View:** The list view table show in same page as the attached file

* The existing data list view as table view  
* With flitter  
* Edit, Delete  
* Export the list filter-wise  
* Pagination

## **5\. Doctor Attendance (In and Out)**  \[Data will be given by the attendee\]

**Purpose**  
To track doctor attendance within the hospital premises.  
**Features**

* Daily in-time and out-time recording  
* Manual entry or biometric integration  
* Attendance and punctuality reports

**Data Fields**

* Doctor ID  
* Doctor Code  
* Doctor Name  
* Date  
* In Time  
* Out Time  
* Attendance Status  
  ![][image11]

## **6\. Doctor's Instructions for chamber/patient/hospital**

**Purpose**  
To allow doctors to issue treatment and care instructions to hospital staff for a patient's care.  
**Features**

* Patient-specific instructions  
* Department or ward-wise instructions  
* Instruction history and audit trail

**Data Fields**

* Doctor ID  
* Doctor Code  
* Doctor Name  
* Instruction Message  
* Date & Time

![][image12]  
**List View of Doctor Instructions:** The list view table should be shown in the same page as the attached file

* The existing data list: Show as a table view  
* With filter  
* Edit, Delete, Active/Inactive  
* Export list: Filter-wise  
* Pagination

## **7\. Doctor Scheduling Report:**

**\*\*\*\*Day-wise available doctor list:**  
**New Requirement, not available in the existing system.**  
Currently, there is no system for viewing the daily doctor schedule (which doctors are available for visiting on a particular day in a single report). This is needed. The user will select the date, and the doctors' list who are available on that date will be shown.  
Input Fields: From Date and To Date \[Datepicker\]  
Report headers: Date, Dr Code, Dr Name, Dr Degree, Total appointment count (on that day)

**Existing Report:**  
**Input Fields for filter:** Branch, Unit, From Date, To Date, Department, Patient Type, Dr. Code, Dr Type  
![][image13]

**Print Version:**![][image14]

## **Appointment Management (Patient Appointment)** This section documents the **Patient Appointment Management**.

**1 Header & System Information**

* **Next SL No**: Auto-generated next serial number for the doctor  
* **Chamber No**: Doctor chamber number from (another table)  
* **Visit Fee Info**: Display of First Visit and Second/Old Visit fees from (doctor table)

**2 Appointment Configuration**

* **Shift**: Morning / Evening / Night  
* **SL No**: Appointment serial number (auto/manual)  
* **Appointment Date**: Date when appointment is created  
* **Visit Date**: Actual consultation date

**3 Doctor Information (Auto Filled)**

* **Dr Code**: Unique doctor code  
* **Doctor Name**: Doctor's full name  
* **Department**: Assigned department (e.g., Nephrology & Medicine)

**4 Patient Basic Information**

* **Patient Name**: Full name of patient  
* **Mobile**: Contact number  
* **Gender**: Male / Female / Other  
* **Birth Date**: Patient's date of birth  
* **Age**: Year / Month / Day (auto calculated if DOB exists)  
* **Patient Type**: OPD / IPD / Emergency  
* Note: if the patient register then the data auto fill form existing data

**5 Visit & Appointment Type**

* **Type**: New / Old (Returning)  
* **Remarks**: Additional notes or instructions  
* **Address**: Patient address

**6 Doctor Availability Panel (Right Side)**  
Displays real-time doctor availability information:

* Day-wise schedule  
* Available time range  
* Closed days highlighted  
* Status messages (e.g., *Doctor hasn’t come yet*)

**7 Appointment Actions**

* **Save**: Save appointment record  
* **Get List**: Load appointment list  
* **Print**: Print appointment slip/token

**8 Appointment List Table**  
Displays all appointments with the following columns:

* Sl No  
* Patient Name  
* Mobile No  
* Gender  
* Type (New/Old)  
* Age  
* Appointment Date  
* Visit Date  
* Appointment By  
* Ref Dr Code  
* Print  
* Edit  
* Cancel (X)  
* Is Arrival  
* Arrival Info  
* Take Payment

**9 Appointment Status Flow**  
Created → Confirmed → Arrived → Visited → Completed / Cancelled  
![][image15]  
**List View of Patient Appointment:** The list view table show in same page as the attached file

* Exiting data list: Show as a table  
* With filter  
* Edit, Delete, Active/Inactive  
* Export list: Filter-wise  
* Pagination  
* Print appointment list: Filter-wise  
* Medication instructions  
* Diet plans  
* Nursing care notes

**Dated: 25.01.2026**
